parents.subject: LU-19079 nodemap: allow switch to gss_id nodemap

commit.subject: LU-19079 tests: fix version checks in gss id tests
commit.message:
LU-19079 tests: fix version checks in gss id tests

Fix version checks in tests related to gss nodemap identification:
- test_79 introduced by
"LU-19079 sec: gss token for nodemap identification"
- test_103 introduced by
"LU-8229 ssk: support auth against multiple similar keys"
- test_104 introduced by
"LU-8229 ssk: support removing keys from keyring via lgss_sk"
- test_105 introduced by
"LU-19079 sec: update nodemap membership on flavor change"
- test_106 introduced by
"LU-19079 nodemap: allow switch to gss_id nodemap"

Fixes: xxxxxxxxxx ("LU-19079 sec: gss token for nodemap identification")
Fixes: xxxxxxxxxx ("LU-8229 ssk: support auth against multiple similar keys")
Fixes: xxxxxxxxxx ("LU-8229 ssk: support removing keys from keyring via lgss_sk")
Fixes: xxxxxxxxxx ("LU-19079 sec: update nodemap membership on flavor change")
Fixes: xxxxxxxxxx ("LU-19079 nodemap: allow switch to gss_id nodemap")

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
Change-Id: I2c0d2476593c1027fd739c5898738cdca04b2641
